corrections.current: χρυσοῦν, καὶ τὴν βάιν ἣν ἀπεστείλατε
corrections.correct: χρυσοῦν, καὶ τὴν βαΐν ἣν ἀπεστείλατε
corrections.note: Diaeresis/accent on βαΐν is visible in the body text.

corrections.current: Ἔτους ἑκατοστοῦ ἑβδομηκοστοῦ πρῶτη ὁ ζυγὸς
corrections.correct: Ἔτους ἑκατοστοῦ ἑβδομηκοστοῦ πρώτῃ ὁ ζυγὸς
corrections.note: Printed text has dative πρώτῃ, not nominative πρῶτη.
The body clearly reads συνευδὼν, not συνελὴν.
Final nu is present in the apparatus reading.
The siglum includes an asterisk after V.
The parenthetical note reads προστερα ras.

corrections.current: ταις γυναιξι (-ξιν V*)] om ταις ℵ
corrections.note: The apparatus omits the first ταις before γυναιξι.
A separator bar follows the parenthetical note before the next variant.
The printed apparatus has rough breathing on οἱ.
The apparatus reading is κατῴκισεν, matching the body variant context.

notes: Running head matches. Body contains duplicated verse numbers from marginal line/verse indicators, but these are not treated as transcription mistakes here except where they alter text; main substantive body errors are in v. 41 and v. 47. Apparatus largely matches but has a few small siglum/spelling issues.
